creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
Port maintainer here, attached update of port to newest version.

Poudriere passes with

poudriere testport -j 112-release-amd64  -p dev -o sysutils/javaservicewrapper
poudriere testport -j 112-release-i386  -p dev -o sysutils/javaservicewrapper
poudriere testport -j 120-release-amd64  -p dev -o sysutils/javaservicewrapper
poudriere testport -j 120-release-i386  -p dev -o sysutils/javaservicewrapper
